name: neural-weights-en-us
model_lineage: v2.6.1-span-boundary-full — init_from v2.5.7-fragment-v5-gentle-full (v257) + the STAGE3 span-boundary aux head (BCE weight 0.5), 8k steps, gentle schedule (lr 1e-5, warmup 500). Tokenizer v0.9.0-multisplice (73,143). The aux head trains boundary placement and is DISCARDED at export — the shipped ONNX is the plain BIO tagger whose ENCODER absorbed the boundary pressure. Gates: US region→street flips 5→2 vs v257, parity postcode 0.9861 PASS, parity street 0.5281 (+13pp vs v241), gauntlet regression+metamorphic PASS (Dublin pin held). Golden country recall 82.0% vs shipped 88.6% is a DOCUMENTED gate exception (#1104): the −6.6pp is entirely on non-postal WOF-admin hierarchy rows (220/224 golden country-gold rows); on real-postal addresses country recall+precision are IDENTICAL to shipped (falsifier, DeepSeek session 019f5f2c). The country-lexicon atlas channel is the permanent fix, in progress.
phase: PROMOTED (6.1.0) — v261 span-boundary head (#727 stage-1): init_from the stable v257 (fragment campaign) + a training-only span-boundary aux head that shrinks the region→street boundary-absorption class. Inference-invariant (aux head off the logits path, not exported).

training.corpus_version: v257 fragment-campaign corpus (shard-v5) re-tokenized through v0.9.0-multisplice; span-boundary aux head from BIO labels.
training.recipe: v2.6.1-span-boundary-full: init_from FINE-TUNE off v257 step-008000, use_span_boundary_head=true (0.5), lr 1e-5, warmup 500, 8k on A100.
training.tokenizer_splice: tokenizer_splice.py build-tokenizer --locales fr --per-file-cap 2000000 over OA fr/countrywide.csv (seed 42, 350k-line corpus, unigram vocab 24000) -> splice 2406 non-ASCII FR pieces into v0.7.1-nsplice (English byte-identity asserted). UNCHANGED from v240 (md5 04995524). The v241 delta over v240 is that the new embedding rows now receive GRADIENT via the init_from fine-tune, not just FVT mean-init.
data_attribution: OpenAddresses CZ — ČÚZK RÚIAN (CC-BY 4.0): tokenizer-splice training text + the oa-cz coord eval sets
OpenAddresses PL — GUGiK / PRG (public, BDOT-derived): tokenizer-splice training text + the oa-pl coord eval sets
OpenAddresses SK — MINV/ZBGIS (CC-0/CC-BY per OA source): oa-sk coord eval set (free-rider validation)
OpenAddresses SI — GURS (CC-BY per OA source): oa-si coord eval set (free-rider validation)
See THIRD_PARTY_NOTICES.md for the standing OpenAddresses / GeoNames / WOF attribution.

architecture.params: ~29M (6-layer/384-hidden encoder + 73,143-piece multisplice embedding; init_from v257, 8k fine-tune w/ a non-exported span-boundary aux head)

requires.$comment: The SHIP-CONFIG this model was TRAINED against (#718) — UNCHANGED from v1.5.0 (v1.8.0 cloned the v1.5.0-fr-order ship config; the single training variable was the fr-admin-split shard). The canonical ProductionScorer (@mailwoman/neural's createScorer) reads this and FAILS CLOSED if a required channel isn't actually fed — closing the #566/#685 trap where a channel-trained model scored channel-OFF silently goes OOD. Read off the gate it shipped against (scripts/eval/gates/v0.5.0-bridge.json: requires_gazetteer_lexicon=true, requires_conventions=auto, requires_bridge=false) plus anchor (the model exports anchor_features). Additive metadata only.

notes: v2.6.1-span-boundary-full (v261, #727 stage-1), shipped as 6.1.0. init_from the stable v257 fragment-campaign checkpoint + a training-only STAGE3 span-boundary aux head (BCE 0.5) that shrinks region→street boundary absorption; the aux head is DISCARDED at export, so the shipped int8 is the plain 33-label BIO tagger whose encoder absorbed the pressure. Tokenizer v0.9.0-multisplice (73,143). Gates: parity street 0.5281 (+13pp vs v241), US region→street flips 5→2 (census /600), postcode 0.9861 PASS, gauntlet regression+metamorphic PASS. The golden country recall −6.6pp (88.6→82.0) is a DOCUMENTED cosmetic gate exception (#1104): 220/224 golden country-gold rows are non-postal WOF-admin hierarchy strings; on the real-postal subset country recall AND precision are IDENTICAL to shipped (falsifier, DeepSeek session 019f5f2c). The permanent fix is the country-lexicon atlas soft-feed channel (feat/country-lexicon-channel), in progress. Full write-up: docs/articles/evals/2026-07-14-v261-promote-country-gate-exception.md. CALIBRATION: the carried isotonic tables were fitted on the v5.3.0 lineage; opt-in, default output unaffected; a re-fit against v261's confidence distribution is a tracked follow-up.

format.model: ONNX int8 dynamic (quantized from fp32, opset 17)
format.tokenizer: SentencePiece unigram, byte_fallback=true, vocab_size=73143 (v0.9.0-multisplice; ships WITH the model, both runtimes load it from this bundle)

calibration.method: isotonic-regression (PAVA) over per-span softmax confidence; OPT-IN via core/decoder createCalibrator
calibration.note: RE-FIT on v5.3.0 (2026-07-04): calibration.json + calibration-per-locale.json are now fitted on THIS model's confidence distribution (35,600 spans over the 8k held-out set), not carried from v4.x. The from-scratch model was under-confident (meanConf 0.913 vs acc 0.980, gap -0.067); the fit corrects held-out OA ECE 0.0698→0.0017 (overall 0.0677→0.0028, per-locale NL 0.166→0.000 / DE 0.114→0.003). Reproduce: collect-span-confidences.ts → fit-isotonic-calibration.py --model-version 5.3.0. Apply via @mailwoman/core/decoder's createCalibrator; default parse output is byte-stable when omitted.

gate_2026_07_04_v530_full_family.promotion_gate: v5.3.0-family gate (clone of v5.2.0-nordic + the fr.postcode 99.3→99.2 revision): PASS with the three operator-approved trades stated above. The promote decision ran on the 2026-07-03 RE-GATE of the archived candidate under the #942-floored stack — fresh dumps BOTH arms, same stack (the #942-D1 stack-drift lesson): 6/6 ni legs PASS; the SI wrong-city re-gate bar (≤+2pp) failed at +2.7pp and was adjudicated at the fork, not silently absorbed. Original 100k battery: 15/17 floors (the two above), mask-regression PASS, zero NaN.
gate_docs: #901 (the campaign + the promote fork), #949 (the FR fragmentation this fixes)
gate_2026_07_04_v530_full_family.ni_legs: US-2k p50 3.27 identical, resolve 1.000 both; FR-3k p50 1.30 identical (deconfounded same-stack); SE +4.6pp resolve; Abo 0.12km vs 859km

gate_2026_07_02_v510_vocab_splice.promotion_gate: #884 gates ALL PASS, pre-registered before measurement (gate log: /mnt/playpen/mailwoman-data/scratch-825/gate-v193/RESULTS.md; evidence comments on #884). US-2k non-inferiority passed at the strongest possible level — the int8 candidate's per-row dump is byte-identical to shipped v4.15.0's. CZ/PL/SK/SI improve gates: wrong-city diff CIs wholly negative, resolved-p50 improve CIs wholly negative, resolve-rate floors held. Functional eyeball: CZ churn (103 fixed / 43 newly-wrong) diagnosed as a pre-existing locality-truncation→namesake residual exposed where the baseline won by garbage-parse fluke — NOT a parse regression (10/10 rows read). The int8 SLO overage (+3.8 MB) was an explicit operator accept (four locales for the same bytes).

wrong_city_resolved_gt20km_n1k.$note: reservoir-sampled 1k-row OA coord sets (oa-{cz,pl,sk,si}-coord-1k.jsonl), graded parse→resolve→great-circle, int8 ship artifact

us_2k_non_inferiority.row_dump: BYTE-IDENTICAL to shipped v4.15.0 int8 (diff 0 everywhere)

gate_2026_07_02_v510_vocab_splice.tokenization_examples: Vysoká 4→1 piece, Grudziądz 6→1, Świętokrzyska 9→1, Čistá 5→2; SK fertility −51.9%, SI −35.2% on diacritic-bearing names with zero SK/SI-specific pieces

gate_2026_06_25_v415_anchor_absorption.promotion_gate: v4.15.0-boundary gate PASS after a stated, operator-approved revision of two postcode floors (us.postcode 97→95, fr.postcode 99.5→99.3). The #723 fix (SLICE-H anchor-ON 20→100) trades −2pp us.postcode LABEL-F1 on the rare leading-5-digit-postcode (VT E911) case. The trade is COORDINATE-INVISIBLE — proven by the non-circular oa-resolver-eval below, not asserted. Every other floor holds with margin (us.locality 76.7/62.2, us.street 82.3/74, us.region 88.6/80.1, de.native_locality 89.3/83.8, arena.perturb 78/71); mask-regression gate (#718) PASS; int8↔fp32 delta 0. No silent drift: the revision is in scripts/eval/gates/v4.15.0-boundary.json with the reason, mirrored here and in the promotion doc.

slice_h_anchor_on.$note: leading-5-digit house# correctly labeled house_number (not postcode) with the anchor ON — the #723 production bug

oa_resolver_eval_us.$note: non-circular: real OA gov lat/lon vs resolved admin centroid, full ship-config (anchor+gazetteer+suppress)

vt_locality_match.$note: VT = the E911 leading-postcode state where the postcode label trade lives — FLAT at the coordinate

label_deltas_coordinate_invisible: us.postcode -2.0 (95.0) — rare leading-5-digit-postcode VT E911 case; VT coordinate flat (92.6=92.6)

gate_2026_06_19_fr_admin_split.promotion_gate: FR centroid gate PASS — surpasses v1.5.0 on the SHIPPED assembled anchor-ON coordinate (held-out FR golden, 3000 disjoint communes): coord p50 42.5→2.2 km, mean 175→105.5 km (−40%), région-emit 39.6→99.6%. US assembled coordinate FLAT (oa-resolver-eval, 2000 OA-US rows: locality-match 97.5→97.6, p50 3.3=3.3). Two label deltas trip the 2pp pre-publish gate, BOTH coordinate-invisible and operator-approved (#728): us.locality −2.2 (precision-only, 0 recall misses) and fr.country −3.5 (resolver given --default-country FR). No silent drift — both stated here + on #728 + the night postmortem.
flagged_deltas_coordinate_invisible: us.locality -2.2 (precision-only — 0 recall misses, spurious-FP on gold-locality-absent rows)
fr.country -3.5 (resolver given --default-country FR, never reaches the coordinate; abandoned v1.8.1 country-shard targeted this)

per_component_int8_shipconfig.$comment: per-locale-f1 anchor-ON matched pair vs v1.5.0 (postmortem guardrail tables). The unfolded per-tag F1 (split affix, intersections, etc.) is the authoritative `capabilities` block below. Tags off the FR-shard path (us intersections/unit, de native_locality, arena.perturb) were not re-measured for v1.8.0 — the single training variable was the FR admin-split shard and the architecture is identical to v1.5.0.

vs_1_5_0.fr_coord_p50: 42.5 → 2.2 km (−95%) — the win; first model in the arc to beat v1.5.0 on the shipped coordinate

files_md5.$comment: Shipped: model.onnx = int8 v261-span-boundary-full step-8000; tokenizer v0.9.0-multisplice.

capabilities.$comment: Per-tier (server=anchor+gazetteer; pocket=anchor-only) × address-system × tag capability manifest (#718/#719). maskOffF1 = measured per-tag exact-match F1 with the conventions mask OFF; maskOnF1 = the same with mask ON (recorded only for tags some codex forbiddenTags row suppresses — the loader's delta-gate consults only those). createScorer FAILS CLOSED when a conventions row forbids a tag with maskOffF1 − maskOnF1 > 0.05 (the mask provably destroys a real capability). Generated by `mailwoman eval capability-manifest` against the v1.5.0 int8.
